author: ljuckett
body:
#### PR description:

This PR changes the testing scripts used for Phase-2 DQM and Validation. The changes bring the test script sequence in line with the production sequence. This was done because several incremental changes were made to the test scripts that meant we were adding histograms to the DQM/Validation code and seeing them produced by the test scripts but not making them in the actual production DQM sequence.

The "missing" histogram code is now called in the actual production sequence. (These were the OTStubV and L1TrackV FinalResolution histograms, and the OTRecHit histograms)

#### Additional Note

The OT RecHit DQM & Validation code is broken. For now, OTRecHit validation is NOT in the production sequence as it often crashes. This PR is only adding "missing" histograms to the production sequence - the "goodness" of these histograms should be fixed in a different PR.

#### PR validation:

1) Test scripts were run and compared with a CMSSW_17_0_0_pre1 RelVal output. The test scripts were then edited to match the production output by removing redundant/extra processes.
2) The DQM & Validation cffs were then edited to add the code for missing histograms
3) The test scripts were run again to check the missing histograms are now produced
title: [DQM][Validation] Phase2 - Update test scripts and add missing histograms to DQM/Validation sequence
